description: Previously tuned two-stage retrieval cases. Keep expected authorities here, not in production retrieval code.

cases.title: Industrial dispute and union bargaining refusal
cases.case_facts: A registered union alleges that an employer refused collective bargaining, threatened transfers, and punished workers after they demanded negotiations.
cases.query: Industrial Disputes collective agreement trade union bargaining employer refusal disciplinary transfer workmen termination labour tribunal arbitration

cases.title: Fundamental-rights arrest and detention
cases.case_facts: Police arrested a person without giving reasons, detained him overnight, and did not produce him promptly before a Magistrate.
cases.query: fundamental rights arbitrary arrest detention Article 13 reasons for arrest produce before Magistrate police custody Article 11 12 Supreme Court

cases.title: Land acquisition compensation for road project
cases.case_facts: A land owner challenges a government acquisition notice for a road project and says compensation ignores market value, improvements, and business disruption.
cases.query: Land Acquisition compensation market value acquisition notice road widening preliminary plan assessment objection appeal allotment

cases.title: Income tax assessment appeal
cases.case_facts: A company receives an additional income tax assessment and penalty after audit and needs objection, appeal, and assessment authorities.
cases.query: Inland Revenue income tax assessment appeal objection notice of assessment penalty audit company Commissioner General tax tribunal

cases.title: Local authority trade licence and nuisance
cases.case_facts: A small shop is told its local authority trade licence may be refused because of public nuisance and alleged by-law violations.
cases.query: local authority trade licence public nuisance by laws municipal council urban council Pradeshiya Sabha business premises offensive trade

cases.title: Minority shareholder oppression and company records
cases.case_facts: Minority shareholders allege exclusion from company records, oppressive conduct, secret share transfers, and improper beneficial ownership disclosures.
cases.query: Companies Act minority shareholder oppression company records share transfer beneficial ownership director duties registrar winding up

cases.title: Criminal assault, evidence, and procedure
cases.case_facts: An accused person faces assault charges. The lawyer needs Penal Code offences, evidence rules, and criminal procedure materials for charge and trial strategy.
cases.query: Penal Code assault grievous hurt criminal liability Evidence Ordinance burden proof Criminal Procedure Code trial charge witness

cases.title: Customs import duty and forfeiture dispute
cases.case_facts: An importer disputes customs valuation, import duty, seizure, forfeiture, and a penalty imposed after clearance.
cases.query: Customs Ordinance import duty valuation forfeiture seizure penalty customs declaration revenue protection order Director General

cases.title: Immigration visa overstay and removal
cases.case_facts: A foreign national faces visa cancellation, overstay consequences, removal, and passport-control issues under Sri Lankan immigration law.
cases.query: Immigrants and Emigrants visa overstay removal deportation passport entry permit residence regulations controller immigration

expected_selectors.label: Immigrants and Emigrants laws and regulations

cases.title: Trademark infringement and IP registration
cases.case_facts: A business alleges trademark infringement and passing off, and needs authorities on registration, ownership, remedies, and IP regulations.
cases.query: Intellectual Property trademark infringement passing off registration ownership remedies copyright patent industrial designs regulations
